recommendations.title: Dimensions of Dialogue
recommendations.overview: Three surreal depictions of failures of communication that occur on all levels of human society.

recommendations.title: Food
recommendations.overview: Examines the human relationship with food by showing breakfast, lunch, and dinner.

recommendations.title: Little Otik
recommendations.overview: When a childless couple learn that they cannot have children, it causes great distress. To ease his wife's pain, the man finds a piece of root in the backyard and chops it and varnishes it into the shape of a child. However the woman takes the root a

recommendations.title: Alice
recommendations.overview: A quiet young English girl named Alice finds herself in an alternate version of her own reality after chasing a white rabbit. She becomes surrounded by living inanimate objects and stuffed dead animals, and must find a way out of this nightmare - no

recommendations.title: Flow
recommendations.overview: A solitary cat, displaced by a great flood, finds refuge on a boat with various species and must navigate the challenges of adapting to a transformed world together.

recommendations.title: I Lost My Body
recommendations.overview: A story of Naoufel, a young man who is in love with Gabrielle. In another part of town, a severed hand escapes from a dissection lab, determined to find its body again.

recommendations.title: The Employment
recommendations.overview: A man prepares and goes to work in a bizarre world, where the meaning of human workforce is taken to another level.

recommendations.title: My Life as a Zucchini
recommendations.overview: After his mother’s death, Zucchini is befriended by a kind police officer, Raymond, who accompanies him to his new foster home filled with other orphans his age. There, with the help of his newfound friends, Zucchini eventually learns to trust and lo

recommendations.title: Frankenstein
recommendations.overview: Henry Frankenstein pieces together body parts in the hope of bringing a human-like creature to life. The mad scientist’s dreams are shattered by his monstrous creation awakening with rage to a world that hates and fears him.

recommendations.title: Hilda and the Mountain King
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Fantasy, Family, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: When Hilda wakes up in the body of a troll, she must use her wits and courage to get back home, become human again — and save the city of Trolberg.
